# Mitanshu Goel

AI and robotics systems engineer based in Delhi, India. Specializes in
edge-deployed inference pipelines, robot perception systems, and embedded AI
at the intersection of physical hardware and learned models.

## Core Profile

- Full name: Mitanshu Goel
- Role: AI & Robotics Engineer (open to research engineering and ML engineering roles)
- Location: Delhi, India
- Email: mitanshug2004@gmail.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/mitanshu-2004
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/mitanshugoel
- Education: B.Tech Electronics & Communication Engineering, Minor in AI/ML —
  Maharaja Agrasen Institute of Technology, Delhi (2022–2026)

## Technical Expertise

- Robotics: ROS, ROS2, MoveIt, Gazebo, URDF, ROS2 Control, inverse kinematics
- Computer Vision: YOLOv8, OpenCV, real-time object detection and tracking
- Edge AI: llama.cpp, ONNX, 4-bit quantization, CPU-only inference
- Generative AI: PyTorch, SDXL, LoRA, diffusion model latent space manipulation
- Embedded Systems: ESP32, Raspberry Pi, ESP-NOW, Arduino, C++ firmware
- ML: scikit-learn, XGBoost, time-series forecasting, RAG pipelines, ChromaDB
- Infrastructure: Docker, FastAPI, Linux, Git

## Key Projects

### Darwin Studio
Evolutionary image generation engine. Treats SDXL latent tensors as genetic material
for mutation and crossover. Custom SLERP implementation for geometrically consistent
latent interpolation. 1024px generation in <4s on T4 GPU (16GB VRAM).
URL: https://mitanshu.me/#darwin-studio

### HEXAPOD
Multi-legged locomotion system. ROS2 control stack deployed on Raspberry Pi via Docker.
Geometric inverse kinematics for deterministic real-time execution. Simulation-verified
gaits transfer to hardware without modification.
URL: https://mitanshu.me/#hexapod

### Memory Assistant — Local RAG Pipeline
Privacy-first retrieval-augmented generation. Phi-3 (4-bit quantized) via llama.cpp
on CPU-only hardware. Hybrid dense-vector (ChromaDB) + keyword retrieval with
weighted scoring. Zero external API dependency.
URL: https://mitanshu.me/#memory-assistant

### SENTINEL
Offline mesh emergency communication. ESP-NOW protocol across ESP32 nodes.
Embedded fall detection (MPU6050 IMU) and gas hazard sensing. No internet
dependency at any layer.
URL: https://mitanshu.me/#sentinel

## Professional Experience

### SarthakAI — AI & Robotics Intern (Jun–Aug 2025)
- Real-time voice pipeline: NVIDIA NeMo STT with custom wake-word detection
- YOLOv8 deployment for human tracking, package classification, gesture control
- Polling-based fault-tolerant robot-AI interface architecture
- ESP32/Raspberry Pi hardware telemetry workstation

### Nextup Robotics — Robotics Intern (Jul–Sep 2024)
- 6-DOF robotic arm configuration in ROS/Gazebo
- MoveIt inverse kinematics and collision-aware trajectory planning (C++)
- 50% reduction in execution time via shortest-path algorithm selection
